## Summary

Briefly describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] Local minimum run: `./gradlew :app:compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon`
- [ ] If relevant, targeted local checks were run (for example `:app:testDebugUnitTest` and/or `:app:lintDebug`)
- [ ] GitHub `build-test-lint` is expected to be the authoritative full validation gate

## UI Evidence (if applicable)

- [ ] Dark theme screenshot(s)
- [ ] Light theme screenshot(s)

## Public Docs

- [ ] Public docs and `CHANGELOG.md` updated when the change affects user-visible behavior, build flow, privacy, or release notes
